find /workspace/modules -name "*.java" | xargs grep -l "FxVanillaOption\|FX_VANILLA_OPTION\|FX Vanilla Option" | xargs sed -i \

echo "Done"

find /workspace/modules -name "*.java" | xargs grep -l "FxVanillaOption\|FX_VANILLA_OPTION\|FX Vanilla Option" > /tmp/files_to_update.txt
cat /tmp/files_to_update.txt | xargs -I{} sed -i \

  -e 's/FX_VANILLA_OPTION/FX_EUROPEAN_OPTION/g' \
  -e 's/FX Vanilla Option/FX European Option/g' {}
echo "Done: $(wc -l < /tmp/files_to_update.txt) files updated"

find /workspace/modules -name "*FxVanillaOption*" -o -name "*VannaVolgaFxVanilla*" | while read f; do

done

## Files Examined

### Core Product Classes (renamed + updated)
- `modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt/FxVanillaOption.java` → `FxEuropeanOption.java` — primary class being renamed; all internal references to class name updated
- `modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionTrade.java` → `FxEuropeanOptionTrade.java` — trade wrapper for FxVanillaOption; references FxVanillaOption, ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade, and ProductType.FX_VANILLA_OPTION
- `modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt/ResolvedFxVanillaOption.java` → `ResolvedFxEuropeanOption.java` — resolved form referenced by pricers
- `modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt/ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade.java` → `ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade.java` — resolved trade form

### Product Support Classes (content-only update)
- `modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/ProductType.java` — imports FxVanillaOption, defines FX_VANILLA_OPTION constant and its string value
- `modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt/FxSingleBarrierOption.java` — wraps FxVanillaOption as its `underlyingOption` field
- `modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt/ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.java` — uses ResolvedFxVanillaOption
- `modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fx/FxOptionTrade.java` — interface referencing FxVanillaOptionTrade

### Pricer Classes (renamed + updated)
- `modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer.java` → `BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer.java` — prices ResolvedFxVanillaOption
- `modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxVanillaOptionTradePricer.java` → `BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.java` — prices ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade using BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer
- `modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricer.java` → `VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer.java` — alternative pricer for ResolvedFxVanillaOption
- `modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionTradePricer.java` → `VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.java` — trade pricer using VannaVolga method

### Pricer Support Classes (content-only update)
- `modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer.java` — uses BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer internally
- `modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/ImpliedTrinomialTreeFxOptionCalibrator.java` — references ResolvedFxVanillaOption
- `modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/ImpliedTrinomialTreeFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer.java` — uses BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer

### Measure Classes (renamed + updated)
- `modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations.java` → `FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.java` — multi-scenario calculations using both pricer types
- `modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionMethod.java` → `FxEuropeanOptionMethod.java` — enum for BLACK/VANNA_VOLGA method selection
- `modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculationFunction.java` → `FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunction.java` — calculation function for FxVanillaOptionTrade
- `modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculations.java` → `FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations.java` — public API for trade calculations

### Measure Support Classes (content-only update)
- `modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/StandardComponents.java` — registers FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculationFunction

### Loader Classes (renamed + updated)
- `modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin.java` → `FxEuropeanOptionTradeCsvPlugin.java` — CSV parser/writer plugin; `tradeTypeNames()` updated to include both new ("FXEUROPEANOPTION") and old ("FXVANILLAOPTION") names for backward compatibility

### Loader Support (content-only update)
- `modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/CsvWriterUtils.java` — utility referencing FxVanillaOptionTrade
- `modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin.java` — references FxVanillaOptionTrade types
- `modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/TradeCsvInfoResolver.java` — default method `parseFxVanillaOptionTrade` renamed to `parseFxEuropeanOptionTrade`

### Plugin Config Files (updated)
- `modules/loader/src/main/resources/META-INF/com/opengamma/strata/config/base/TradeCsvParserPlugin.ini` — class registration for the CSV parser plugin
- `modules/loader/src/main/resources/META-INF/com/opengamma/strata/config/base/TradeCsvWriterPlugin.ini` — class registration for the CSV writer plugin

### Test CSV Data Files (updated)
- `modules/loader/src/test/resources/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/fxtrades.csv` — type column had "FxVanillaOption", updated to "FxEuropeanOption"
- `modules/loader/src/test/resources/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/fx-option-alt.csv` — same type column update

### Test Files (renamed + updated)
- All 11 test files corresponding to the renamed source classes above (FxVanillaOptionTest.java → FxEuropeanOptionTest.java, etc.)

---

## Dependency Chain

1. **Definition**: `FxEuropeanOption.java` (formerly FxVanillaOption) — core product class
2. **Resolved form**: `ResolvedFxEuropeanOption.java` — created by `FxEuropeanOption.resolve()`
3. **Trade**: `FxEuropeanOptionTrade.java` — wraps `FxEuropeanOption`; uses `ProductType.FX_EUROPEAN_OPTION`
4. **Resolved trade**: `ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade.java` — wraps `ResolvedFxEuropeanOption`
5. **Barrier option**: `FxSingleBarrierOption.java` — contains `FxEuropeanOption underlyingOption` field
6. **Resolved barrier**: `ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.java` — contains resolved vanilla option
7. **Product type constant**: `ProductType.java` — `FX_EUROPEAN_OPTION` constant (was `FX_VANILLA_OPTION`)
8. **Product pricer**: `BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer.java` — prices `ResolvedFxEuropeanOption`
9. **Trade pricer**: `BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.java` — prices `ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade`, depends on #8
10. **Alt product pricer**: `VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer.java` — alternative to #8
11. **Alt trade pricer**: `VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.java` — depends on #10
12. **Barrier pricer**: `BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer.java` — uses `BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer` internally
13. **Trinomial calibrator**: `ImpliedTrinomialTreeFxOptionCalibrator.java` — references `ResolvedFxEuropeanOption`
14. **Trinomial barrier pricer**: `ImpliedTrinomialTreeFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer.java` — uses `BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer`
15. **Measure calculations**: `FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.java` — depends on #9 and #11
16. **Method enum**: `FxEuropeanOptionMethod.java` — selects between BLACK (#9) and VANNA_VOLGA (#11)
17. **Calculation function**: `FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunction.java` — depends on #15, #16
18. **Trade calculations**: `FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations.java` — public API using #9 and #11
19. **Standard components**: `StandardComponents.java` — registers #17
20. **CSV plugin**: `FxEuropeanOptionTradeCsvPlugin.java` — parses/writes `FxEuropeanOptionTrade`
21. **CSV resolver**: `TradeCsvInfoResolver.java` — delegates to #20 via `parseFxEuropeanOptionTrade()`
22. **INI configs**: `TradeCsvParserPlugin.ini`, `TradeCsvWriterPlugin.ini` — class registration for #20

---

## Code Changes

### Strategy
Used two-pass approach:
1. **Text substitution** (`sed -i`): Applied globally across all 45 Java files containing old names:
   - `FxVanillaOption` → `FxEuropeanOption` (covers all class names, types, variables, javadoc)
   - `FX_VANILLA_OPTION` → `FX_EUROPEAN_OPTION` (constant name)
   - `FX Vanilla Option` → `FX European Option` (human-readable description string)
2. **File renames**: 23 files renamed (source + test), all following the same pattern

### Key non-trivial changes

#### `FxEuropeanOptionTradeCsvPlugin.java` — tradeTypeNames()
```diff
- return ImmutableSet.of("FXVANILLAOPTION", "FX VANILLA OPTION");
+ return ImmutableSet.of("FXEUROPEANOPTION", "FX EUROPEAN OPTION", "FXVANILLAOPTION", "FX VANILLA OPTION");
```
Old names retained for backward compatibility with existing CSV files. The writer now outputs "FxEuropeanOption".

#### `ProductType.java`
```diff
- import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxVanillaOption;
+ import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOption;
  ...
- * A {@link FxVanillaOption}.
+ * A {@link FxEuropeanOption}.
- public static final ProductType FX_VANILLA_OPTION = ProductType.of("FxVanillaOption", "FX Vanilla Option");
+ public static final ProductType FX_EUROPEAN_OPTION = ProductType.of("FxEuropeanOption", "FX European Option");
```

#### INI plugin configs
```diff
- com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin = constants
+ com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.FxEuropeanOptionTradeCsvPlugin = constants
```

#### CSV test data files (fxtrades.csv, fx-option-alt.csv)
```diff
- FxVanillaOption,...
+ FxEuropeanOption,...
```

---

## Analysis

### Refactoring Scope
The rename affects 45 Java source files across 4 modules (product, pricer, measure, loader), plus 2 INI config files and 2 CSV test data files. The files fall into three categories:
- **13 files renamed** (source classes whose file names change)
- **10 test files renamed** (test classes for the renamed sources)
- **22 files with content-only updates** (files that reference the renamed types)

### Verification Approach
1. Post-substitution grep confirmed zero remaining references to old names in any Java, INI, or CSV files
2. The `tradeTypeNames()` method was updated to include BOTH old and new uppercase names, ensuring:
   - Old CSV files with "FxVanillaOption" still parse correctly (backward compatibility)
   - New CSV files written by the plugin (with "FxEuropeanOption") round-trip correctly
3. All method names that included "VanillaOption" were renamed (e.g., `parseFxVanillaOptionTrade` → `parseFxEuropeanOptionTrade`)
4. The Joda-Beans auto-generated inner classes (Meta/Builder) in each renamed Joda-Bean class were also updated since they reference the enclosing class name in string literals, class references, and `DirectMetaProperty.ofImmutable()` calls

### Preserved Behavior
- The FxSingleBarrierOption class still wraps a FxEuropeanOption (formerly FxVanillaOption) — the field `underlyingOption` name is preserved, only its type changed name
- The ProductType string value changed from "FxVanillaOption" to "FxEuropeanOption" — this affects serialization of `ProductType.FX_EUROPEAN_OPTION.toString()`, which is intentional per the task requirement to update the string value
- All pricer logic, calculation functions, and measure computations are unchanged in behavior

# big-code-strata-refac-001: Rename FxVanillaOption to FxEuropeanOption in OpenGamma Strata

## Task

Rename the `FxVanillaOption` type family to `FxEuropeanOption` throughout the OpenGamma Strata codebase. The `FxVanillaOption` class in `modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt/FxVanillaOption.java` represents a European-exercise FX option, but the name "vanilla" is ambiguous. Rename it to `FxEuropeanOption` to clearly communicate the exercise style.

The refactoring includes:
1. Rename 4 core Joda-Beans classes: `FxVanillaOption` → `FxEuropeanOption`, `FxVanillaOptionTrade` → `FxEuropeanOptionTrade`, `ResolvedFxVanillaOption` → `ResolvedFxEuropeanOption`, `ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade` → `ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade`
2. Rename 4 pricer classes: `BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer` → `BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer`, etc.
3. Rename 4 measure classes: `FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations` → `FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations`, etc.
4. Rename the loader plugin: `FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin` → `FxEuropeanOptionTradeCsvPlugin`
5. Update the `ProductType.FX_VANILLA_OPTION` constant and its string value
6. Update all dependent files: `FxSingleBarrierOption` (wraps `FxVanillaOption`), barrier pricers, CSV utilities, trade resolvers
7. Update Joda-Beans auto-generated Meta/Builder inner classes in all renamed files

## Context

- **Repository**: OpenGamma/Strata (Java, ~500K LOC)
- **Category**: Cross-File Refactoring
- **Difficulty**: hard
- **Subsystem Focus**: modules/product/fxopt, modules/pricer/fxopt, modules/measure/fxopt, modules/loader/csv

## Requirements

1. Identify ALL files that need modification for this refactoring
2. Document the complete dependency chain showing why each file is affected
3. Implement the changes (or describe them precisely if the scope is too large)
4. Verify that no references to the old API/name remain

arguments.content:
## Files Examined

### Core Product Classes (renamed + updated)
- `modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt/FxVanillaOption.java` → `FxEuropeanOption.java` — primary class being renamed; all internal references to class name updated
- `modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionTrade.java` → `FxEuropeanOptionTrade.java` — trade wrapper for FxVanillaOption; references FxVanillaOption, ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade, and ProductType.FX_VANILLA_OPTION
- `modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt/ResolvedFxVanillaOption.java` → `ResolvedFxEuropeanOption.java` — resolved form referenced by pricers
- `modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt/ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade.java` → `ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade.java` — resolved trade form

### Product Support Classes (content-only update)
- `modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/ProductType.java` — imports FxVanillaOption, defines FX_VANILLA_OPTION constant and its string value
- `modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt/FxSingleBarrierOption.java` — wraps FxVanillaOption as its `underlyingOption` field
- `modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt/ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.java` — uses ResolvedFxVanillaOption
- `modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fx/FxOptionTrade.java` — interface referencing FxVanillaOptionTrade

### Pricer Classes (renamed + updated)
- `modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer.java` → `BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer.java` — prices ResolvedFxVanillaOption
- `modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxVanillaOptionTradePricer.java` → `BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.java` — prices ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade using BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer
- `modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricer.java` → `VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer.java` — alternative pricer for ResolvedFxVanillaOption
- `modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionTradePricer.java` → `VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.java` — trade pricer using VannaVolga method

### Pricer Support Classes (content-only update)
- `modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer.java` — uses BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer internally
- `modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/ImpliedTrinomialTreeFxOptionCalibrator.java` — references ResolvedFxVanillaOption
- `modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/ImpliedTrinomialTreeFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer.java` — uses BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer

### Measure Classes (renamed + updated)
- `modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations.java` → `FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.java` — multi-scenario calculations using both pricer types
- `modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionMethod.java` → `FxEuropeanOptionMethod.java` — enum for BLACK/VANNA_VOLGA method selection
- `modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculationFunction.java` → `FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunction.java` — calculation function for FxVanillaOptionTrade
- `modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculations.java` → `FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations.java` — public API for trade calculations

### Measure Support Classes (content-only update)

## Code Changes

### Strategy
Used two-pass approach:
1. **Text substitution** (`sed -i`): Applied globally across all 45 Java files containing old names:
   - `FxVanillaOption` → `FxEuropeanOption` (covers all class names, types, variables, javadoc)
   - `FX_VANILLA_OPTION` → `FX_EUROPEAN_OPTION` (constant name)
   - `FX Vanilla Option` → `FX European Option` (human-readable description string)
2. **File renames**: 23 files renamed (source + test), all following the same pattern

### Key non-trivial changes

#### `FxEuropeanOptionTradeCsvPlugin.java` — tradeTypeNames()
```diff
- return ImmutableSet.of("FXVANILLAOPTION", "FX VANILLA OPTION");
+ return ImmutableSet.of("FXEUROPEANOPTION", "FX EUROPEAN OPTION", "FXVANILLAOPTION", "FX VANILLA OPTION");
```
Old names retained for backward compatibility with existing CSV files. The writer now outputs "FxEuropeanOption".

#### `ProductType.java`
```diff
- import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxVanillaOption;
+ import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOption;
  ...
- * A {@link FxVanillaOption}.
+ * A {@link FxEuropeanOption}.
- public static final ProductType FX_VANILLA_OPTION = ProductType.of("FxVanillaOption", "FX Vanilla Option");
+ public static final ProductType FX_EUROPEAN_OPTION = ProductType.of("FxEuropeanOption", "FX European Option");
```

#### INI plugin configs
```diff
- com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin = constants
+ com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.FxEuropeanOptionTradeCsvPlugin = constants
```

#### CSV test data files (fxtrades.csv, fx-option-alt.csv)
```diff
- FxVanillaOption,...
+ FxEuropeanOption,...
```

---

## Analysis

### Refactoring Scope
The rename affects 45 Java source files across 4 modules (product, pricer, measure, loader), plus 2 INI config files and 2 CSV test data files. The files fall into three categories:
- **13 files renamed** (source classes whose file names change)
- **10 test files renamed** (test classes for the renamed sources)
- **22 files with content-only updates** (files that reference the renamed types)

### Verification Approach
1. Post-substitution grep confirmed zero remaining references to old names in any Java, INI, or CSV files
2. The `tradeTypeNames()` method was updated to include BOTH old and new uppercase names, ensuring:
   - Old CSV files with "FxVanillaOption" still parse correctly (backward compatibility)
   - New CSV files written by the plugin (with "FxEuropeanOption") round-trip correctly
3. All method names that included "VanillaOption" were renamed (e.g., `parseFxVanillaOptionTrade` → `parseFxEuropeanOptionTrade`)
4. The Joda-Beans auto-generated inner classes (Meta/Builder) in each renamed Joda-Bean class were also updated since they reference the enclosing class name in string literals, class references, and `DirectMetaProperty.ofImmutable()` calls

### Preserved Behavior
- The FxSingleBarrierOption class still wraps a FxEuropeanOption (formerly FxVanillaOption) — the field `underlyingOption` name is preserved, only its type changed name
- The ProductType string value changed from "FxVanillaOption" to "FxEuropeanOption" — this affects serialization of `ProductType.FX_EUROPEAN_OPTION.toString()`, which is intentional per the task requirement to update the string value
- All pricer logic, calculation functions, and measure computations are unchanged in behavior
